name: Poisoner
description: Increase your Dexterity or Intelligence score by 1, to a maximum of 20. You gain proficiency with the poisoner's kit. When you make a damage roll that deals Poison damage, it ignores Resistance to Poison damage. You can create doses of potent poison with 1 hour of work and 50 GP. As a Bonus Action, you can apply a dose to a weapon or ammunition. The next time you deal damage with that item within 1 minute, the target must succeed on a Constitution saving throw (DC 8 + ability modifier + proficiency bonus) or take 2d8 Poison damage and have the Poisoned condition until the end of your next turn.
